description_long: This is a modern, freestanding wooden shelving unit with an asymmetrical arrangement of open shelves and solid panels. The frame is thick and rectangular, providing a sturdy border around the shelving compartments. The shelves are of varying sizes and are interspersed with solid wooden panels, creating a geometric, visually interesting pattern. The wood has a warm, medium-brown finish with visible grain, giving it a natural and contemporary look. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, and the back appears to be open, allowing for visibility and access from both sides. This piece is suitable for use as a room divider, display shelf, or storage unit in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or modern homes.
description: A modern, freestanding wooden shelving unit with an asymmetrical pattern of open shelves and solid panels in a warm brown finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arrangement of open shelves and solid panels, highlighting the geometric design.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the unit and the thickness of the frame, with shelves visible through the side.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the same pattern of shelves and panels, confirming the open-back design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth and open structure of the shelving.
